headline: Has Hasbro (HAS) Run Too Far After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Hasbro's share price still offers value after a strong run, or if you might be arriving late to the story, this article walks through what the current valuation is really telling you. Hasbro's stock closed at US$97.63, with returns of 9.3% over the last month, 17.7% year to date and 63.6% over the past year. The last week shows a 2.2% decline that may signal a pause after a bigger move, or a shift in how the market views risk. Recent headlines have focused on...
